title: Extend `jit validate` and gate-checker integration
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 9.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] jit validate accepts a positional [<id>] (net-new surface) plus --json; runs local and graph rules for one issue or whole-repo.
- [hard] --explain lists matched selectors -> rule names -> outcomes for an issue.
- [hard] Gates invoke validation via the JIT_ISSUE_ID env var: --checker-command 'jit validate "$JIT_ISSUE_ID" --json'. No {issue} placeholder is assumed.
- [hard] The new positional and flags appear in `jit --schema` so the MCP server auto-generates a working tool; a parity test asserts this.
- [hard] Output reports rule name, severity, and message; non-zero exit on error findings.
